summary: Comprehensive testing of Archer new features: Risk Score History Graph, Outcome Predictor, Document Scanner, and Stripe Payment Integration. All 22 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI components render correctly with proper data-testid attributes.
passed_tests: Backend: Health check endpoints (/api/, /api/health)
Backend: GET /api/cases/{case_id}/risk-history returns risk score history array
Backend: Risk history requires authentication (401)
Backend: Risk history returns 404 for invalid case
Backend: POST /api/cases/{case_id}/predict-outcome calls Claude AI and returns prediction
Backend: Outcome prediction requires authentication (401)
Backend: Outcome prediction returns 404 for invalid case
Backend: POST /api/documents/scan endpoint accepts base64 image
Backend: Document scan requires authentication (401)
Backend: Document scan endpoint exists
Backend: POST /api/payments/checkout creates Stripe checkout for pro_monthly ($69)
Backend: POST /api/payments/checkout creates Stripe checkout for lawyer_call ($149)
Backend: Checkout returns 400 for invalid package
Backend: Checkout requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/payments/status returns 404 for invalid session
Backend: Payment status requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/webhook/stripe endpoint exists
Backend: GET /api/lawyers returns seeded lawyers
Backend: GET /api/cases returns user cases
Backend: GET /api/cases/{case_id} returns case detail
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats returns stats
Frontend: Landing page loads with Archer branding
Frontend: Login page has Google OAuth button
Frontend: Payment success route exists (/payment/success)
Frontend: Payment cancel route exists (/payment/cancel)
Frontend: Dashboard loads with session cookie
Frontend: Document Scanner section renders on Upload page
Frontend: Camera input found for Document Scanner
Frontend: Scan document button found
Frontend: Risk Score History chart renders on Case Detail page
Frontend: Outcome Predictor toggle renders on Case Detail page
Frontend: Outcome Predictor displays prediction results when clicked
Frontend: Settings page Plan & billing tab works
Frontend: Upgrade button ($69/month) visible for free plan users
Frontend: Pro plan billing info visible for pro users
Frontend: LawyerBook page renders with $149 confirm button
Frontend: Time slots render on LawyerBook page
Frontend: Lawyers page loads with 6 seeded lawyers

test_credentials.note: Test sessions created via MongoDB for automated testing

seed_data_creation: Test case with risk_score_history created for testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (Risk Score History, Outcome Predictor, Document Scanner, Stripe Integration) are working correctly. Backend APIs return proper responses. Frontend components render with correct data-testid attributes. Stripe checkout creates valid sessions with emergentintegrations library. The test file /app/backend/tests/test_new_features.py can be reused for regression testing.

risk_score_history.frontend_component: RiskHistoryChart SVG renders on case detail page - WORKING
risk_score_history.data_structure: Returns {current_score, history[]} with score, date, document_name fields

outcome_predictor.frontend_component: OutcomePredictor toggle and results display - WORKING

document_scanner.frontend_component: Document Scanner section with camera input - WORKING
document_scanner.ai_integration: Claude Vision API for OCR analysis
